title: 24 Pcs Artificial Christmas Pine Picks Christmas Berries Artificial Stem with Pinecones Apples Bells Christmas Flower Picks for Christmas Tree Wreath Arrangement Winter Holiday Decor
features: Adequate Quantity: You will receive 24 pieces of Christmas pine branches in different styles, 12 kinds in total, and with a variety of Christmas elements, pine cones, berries, holly leaves, red apples, bells, etc.(Dimensions as shown)

DIY: Christmas green leaf stem and red berry stem can be used to make Christmas wreaths or vase stuffing, the biggest meaning is that you can spend time with your family and make happy holiday memories.
High Quality: Made of plastic, foam and pine cones, the appearance is very realistic, not easy to damage, and the color is particularly eye-catching, it is easy to attract people's eyes.
Classic Decorations: These pine branches are an indispensable Christmas decoration, very classic and will not be outdated, can greatly add to the festive atmosphere.

Versatile: These Christmas berry branches are perfect for Christmas tree decorations, Christmas wreaths, Christmas centrepieces, festive flower arrangements, table setting decorations, Christmas gift wrapping, winter wedding floral decorations and more.
description: Containing a variety of Christmas elements, the 24 miniature pine boughs are the most iconic decorations for Christmas and also make the season richer and more warm. Specification: Material: Plastic Color: Multiple colours Size: as shown in the picture Package: 24 x Christmas pine branches Features: Rich : Contains a variety of Christmas elements, which can be used as a perfect complement to add more fun to Christmas, add icing on the cake and enhance the atmosphere of Christmas. Mini : The small size is more perfect and other types of Christmas products complement each other, like a whole, make your Christmas decoration more delicate.
